title: An Ordinance adopting Republic Act No. 11148 known as ? An act scaling up the National and Local Health and Nutrition Programs through strengthened integrated strategy for Maternal, Neonatal, Child Health and Nutrition in the First One Thousand (1000) days of Life, appropriating funds therefore and for other purposes? or otherwise known as ?Kalusugan ng Magnanay Act.? (Author: Hon. Josephine S. Evangelista, 11/08/19)
